messages.body: Hi Cherie & Anel, hope you're both doing well!  I wanted to follow up on a couple of items: 1. Demure Cancellation – Good news, we've already informed management about canceling the subscription. There's just a small acc…

Hi Cherie! Hope you're doing well. I wanted to follow up on your cancellation request—totally understand, and I'm here to make this as easy as possible for you.  Before we wrap everything up, I'd love to hop on a quick 1…

Hi Anel & Cherie! Hope you're doing well. We've received your cancellation request for Demure Wellness Management, and I understand you're looking to work with us through a different business model for your other healthc…

Wishing you and your family a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! 🎄✨  May the year ahead be filled with good health, happiness, and meaningful moments. We truly wish you continued success, steady growth, and excit…
Camero Wellness Management, how may I

Hey Anel, I’m so sorry for the delayed response. Could you please let me know if you have some time tomorrow for a quick call? I’d really appreciate the chance to connect and go over everything with you.
Is there a way to add our location to google maps and the iphone gps app? We used to have it because I was able to tag us on Instagram and then it disappeared
Do you have some time tomorrow?
Hi! Sorry I’m available today or tomorrow(:
Hey Anel, I hope you’re doing well! I’d love to connect tomorrow if you have some time — just let me know what works best for you:)
Hi! Can I schedule a zoom meeting? Just for an update?
